name: Coca-Cola Icecek Anonim Sirketi
summary: Coca-Cola I√É¬ßecek Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, engages in bottling and distributing alcohol-free beverages primarily in Turkey, Jordan, Kazakhstan, Azerbaijan, Pakistan, Kyrgyzstan, Turkmenistan, Iraq, Syria, and Tajikistan. The company is involved in the production, distribution, and sale of sparkling and still beverages under the Coca-Cola, Coca-Cola Zero, Coca-Cola Zero Sugar, Coca-Cola Light, Fanta, Sprite, Cappy, Sen Sun, Powerade, Monster, Burn, Gladiator, and Fuse tea brand names, as well as Schweppes brand name. Its product portfolio also include juices, water, sports and energy drinks, tea, and iced tea. In addition, the company engages in the production and filling of natural spring water under the Damla name. Further, the company sells its products online. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Coca-Cola I√É¬ßecek Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Anadolu Efes Biracilik ve Malt Sanayi A.S.
